title: New BEST local AI image generator is here!
summary: Ideogram 4 is presented as a local, open-source AI image generator with capabilities in text rendering, prompt adherence, world knowledge, and bounding box control. The tutorial demonstrates integration with ComfyUI and includes features like safety filters and manga generation.
writeup: AI Search presents Ideogram 4 as a local, open-source AI image generator and walks through its setup. The video covers text rendering, prompt adherence, world knowledge, and bounding box control, along with integration into ComfyUI. It also demonstrates safety filters and manga generation as part of the workflow.
